title: Gravitationally Lensed View of DSFG-1 in PLCK G165.7+67.0: Strong Dust Emission and Spatially Resolved Stellar Population Analysis with JWST and SMA
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures, 3 tables, accepted by ApJ
summary: We present a detailed stellar population analysis of the strongly lensed dusty star-forming galaxy (DSFG) PLCK G165.7+67.0 DSFG-1 at $z = 2.236$, combining JWST NIRCam imaging with new Submillimeter Array (SMA) observations. This source is multiply imaged into two lensed components: image 1a, with a moderate magnification factor of $μ\sim 5$, and image 1bc, with an extreme magnification factor of $μ\sim 40$. The new SMA observations detect significant dust continuum emission at 225GHz and 273GHz, with combined flux densities of $S_{\rm cont}=(1.19\pm0.38)$ mJy in image 1a and $S_{\rm cont}=(10.02\pm0.85)$ mJy in image 1bc, indicating active star formation at sub-kpc scale. Based on the integrated SED modeling, DSFG-1 exhibits a lensing amplification-corrected stellar mass of $M_{\star} = (1.2 \pm 0.4) \times 10^{10} M_{\odot}$, and a star-formation rate (SFR) of $(103 \pm 14) M_{\odot}\,\mathrm{yr^{-1}}$, similar to previous $Hα$-based results, placing it four times above the star-forming main sequence at this redshift. Its location on the size-mass plane and its morphological properties suggest that the system occupies a transitional phase between star-forming late-type galaxies and compact early-type systems. Together with its elevated star-formation activity, this is consistent with a rapidly evolving galaxy observed during Cosmic Noon. We further investigate the spatially resolved stellar population properties, and found significant spatial variations in stellar age and dust attenuation. These results point to a non-uniform star-formation history and highlight the complex interplay between dust geometry, stellar growth, and gravitational lensing, consistent with a merger scenario.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们结合JWST NIRCam成像与新的亚毫米波阵列（SMA）观测，对红移$z = 2.236$的强引力透镜尘埃恒星形成星系（DSFG）PLCK G165.7+67.0 DSFG-1进行了详细的恒星族分析。该源被多重成像为两个透镜分量：像1a，放大因子中等，$μ\sim 5$；像1bc，放大因子极高，$μ\sim 40$。新的SMA观测在225GHz和273GHz探测到显著的尘埃连续谱发射，像1a的综合流量密度为$S_{\rm cont}=(1.19\pm0.38)$ mJy，像1bc为$S_{\rm cont}=(10.02\pm0.85)$ mJy，表明在亚千秒差距尺度上存在活跃的恒星形成。基于积分SED模型，DSFG-1经透镜放大校正后的恒星质量为$M_{\star} = (1.2 \pm 0.4) \times 10^{10} M_{\odot}$，恒星形成率（SFR）为$(103 \pm 14) M_{\odot}\,\mathrm{yr^{-1}}$，与先前的$Hα$结果相似，使其在该红移处位于恒星形成主序带之上四倍。其在尺寸-质量平面上的位置及其形态学性质表明，该系统处于从恒星形成晚型星系向致密早型系统过渡的阶段。结合其升高的恒星形成活动，这与在宇宙正午时期观测到的一个快速演化星系一致。我们进一步研究了空间分辨的恒星族性质，并发现恒星年龄和尘埃消光存在显著的空间变化。这些结果指向一个非均匀的恒星形成历史，并突显了尘埃几何结构、恒星增长和引力透镜之间复杂的相互作用，与并合情景一致。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该星系在宇宙正午时期处于快速演化阶段，从晚型向早型系统过渡，非均匀的恒星形成历史和尘埃几何结构支持合并驱动演化场景。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: JWST NIRCam RGB images (F115W, F277W, and F444W) overlaid with SMA continuum contours for the lensed components of G165-DSFG-1 and the corresponding SED fitting results. Panels a) and b) show the JWST RGB images of the northern Arc 1a and the southern Arc 1bc in the image plane, respectively, with SMA continuum contours overlaid. The inset in panel b) shows the corresponding JWST F115W grayscale image of Arc 1bc. The red circle marks a likely foreground object projected onto Arc 1b, which is not associated with the lensed source. The Arc 3c of DSFG-3 is also visible in b) and is labeled accordingly. Panels d) and e) present the best-fit SEDs of arcs 1a and 1bc derived in the source plane. Panel c) shows the reconstructed source-plane JWST RGB image with SMA continuum contours for the combined DSFG-1 system, while panel f) presents the global SED fitting result of DSFG-1. In panels a) and b) , SMA contours are shown at \(-4\sigma\) (dashed) and \(4\sigma\) , \(7\sigma\) , \(10\sigma\) (solid), where \(\sigma=7.892\) MJy sr -1 . In panel c) , SMA contours are shown at \(-2\sigma\) (dashed) and \(4\sigma\) , \(6\sigma\) , \(8\sigma\) (solid), with the same noise level \(\sigma=7.892\) MJy sr -1 . The source-plane beam, indicated in the lower left corner of panel c) , is derived by projecting the image-plane SMA beams of arcs 1a and 1bc through the gravitational lensing model and averaging the resulting source-plane beams.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：JWST NIRCam RGB图像（F115W、F277W和F444W）叠加了G165-DSFG-1透镜分量的SMA连续谱等值线及相应的SED拟合结果。面板a)和b)分别显示了像平面中北部弧1a和南部弧1bc的JWST RGB图像，并叠加了SMA连续谱等值线。面板b)中的插图显示了弧1bc对应的JWST F115W灰度图像。红色圆圈标记了一个可能的前景天体，投影在弧1b上，与透镜源无关。DSFG-3的弧3c也在b)中可见并已标注。面板d)和e)展示了在源平面中推导出的弧1a和1bc的最佳拟合SED。面板c)显示了重建的源平面JWST RGB图像，叠加了组合DSFG-1系统的SMA连续谱等值线，而面板f)展示了DSFG-1的整体SED拟合结果。在面板a)和b)中，SMA等值线显示在\(-4\sigma\)（虚线）以及\(4\sigma\)、\(7\sigma\)、\(10\sigma\)（实线）处，其中\(\sigma=7.892\) MJy sr -1 。在面板c)中，SMA等值线显示在\(-2\sigma\)（虚线）以及\(4\sigma\)、\(6\sigma\)、\(8\sigma\)（实线）处，噪声水平相同，\(\sigma=7.892\) MJy sr -1 。面板c)左下角指示的源平面波束，是通过将弧1a和1bc的像平面SMA波束投影经过引力透镜模型并平均所得源平面波束推导得出的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Forward-modeling best-fit result of the SMA 240+345 GHz continuum emission. The left panel shows the observed SMA image-plane continuum map, the middle panel shows the reconstructed image-plane model generated from a symmetric source-plane Sérsic profile and propagated through the lens model, and the right panel shows the nomalized residual map, \(({obs}-{model})/{rms}\) , which quantifies the significance of the residuals relative to the local noise level. The model successfully reproduces the apparent flux asymmetry between images 1b and 1c without requiring intrinsic asymmetry in the source. The normalized residuals remain below \(3\sigma\) across the fitted region, indicating that the observed morphology is well explained by the combined effects of differential magnification and the anisotropic SMA synthesized beam.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：SMA 240+345 GHz连续谱发射的正向建模最佳拟合结果。左面板显示了观测到的SMA像平面连续谱图，中间面板显示了由对称源平面Sérsic轮廓生成并经透镜模型传播的重建像平面模型，右面板显示了归一化残差图\(({obs}-{model})/{rms}\)，该图量化了残差相对于局部噪声水平的显著性。该模型成功再现了像1b和1c之间视在的流量不对称性，而无需源具有内在不对称性。归一化残差在拟合区域内保持在\(3\sigma\)以下，表明观测到的形态学特征可由差动放大和各向异性SMA合成波束的综合效应很好地解释。

title: Polar coordinate transformations for machine learning based dark matter subhalo detection in strong gravitational lenses
summary: Strong gravitational lensing provides a powerful probe of dark matter, particularly on small scales where the gravitational effects of dark matter subhalos within galaxies can manifest as perturbations within the extended arcs of gravitationally lensed sources. We investigate whether transforming lensed images into polar coordinates improves the ability of convolutional neural networks to infer subhalo mass. We introduce a machine learning architecture that outputs a prediction uncertainty alongside a mass prediction to enable assessment of network reliability. Using simulated Hubble Space Telescope observations, we compare our models trained on Cartesian and polar representations under different initialisation schemes, noise levels, and subhalo concentrations ($c=60$, $c=30$). We find that polar-transformed inputs consistently yield higher subhalo detection fractions than standard Cartesian images across all tested masses. For subhalos with mass $10^9M_\odot \leq M \leq 10^{9.5}M_\odot$, the fraction of subhalos the network is able to detect increases by $\sim 15$ per cent. Pretrained networks outperform randomly initialized networks, and the polar transform consistently improves network performance in both low signal-to-noise data and for lower-concentration subhalos. The relative improvement is highest in regimes where subhalo perturbations are most difficult to detect, such as low signal-to-noise data or systems containing low concentration subhalos. These results demonstrate that presenting strong lensing images in a polar representaion provides a computationally inexpensive way of improving CNN-based subhalo detection.

AI.tldr: 本文研究将强引力透镜图像转换为极坐标表示，能否提升卷积神经网络检测暗物质子晕的能力。结果表明，极坐标转换能持续提高子晕检测率（尤其在低信噪比和低浓度子晕情况下），且预训练网络优于随机初始化网络。
AI.motivation: 强引力透镜是探测暗物质（特别是小尺度暗物质子晕）的有力工具。子晕的引力效应会扰动透镜源形成的弧结构。作者希望探究将透镜图像转换为极坐标表示是否能提升CNN推断子晕质量的能力。
AI.method: 设计了一种能同时输出质量预测和预测不确定性的机器学习架构。使用模拟的哈勃太空望远镜观测数据，比较了在笛卡尔坐标和极坐标表示下训练的不同初始化方案、噪声水平和子晕浓度（c=60, c=30）的模型性能。
AI.result: 极坐标转换在所有测试质量下均获得更高的子晕检测率。对于质量在10^9M⊙到10^9.5M⊙的子晕，检测率提升约15%。预训练网络优于随机初始化网络，极坐标转换在低信噪比和低浓度子晕情况下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 将强透镜图像表示为极坐标形式是一种计算成本低廉的方法，可以有效提升基于CNN的子晕检测性能，尤其在子晕扰动最难检测的弱信号场景下改善最为显著。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜效应为暗物质研究提供了有力探针，尤其是在小尺度上，星系内暗物质子晕的引力效应可表现为引力透镜源延展弧中的扰动。我们研究了将透镜图像转换为极坐标是否能提升卷积神经网络推断子晕质量的能力。我们引入了一种机器学习架构，该架构在输出质量预测的同时还输出预测不确定性，从而能够评估网络的可靠性。利用模拟的哈勃空间望远镜观测数据，我们比较了在不同初始化方案、噪声水平和子晕浓度（$c=60$, $c=30$）下，基于笛卡尔坐标和极坐标表示训练的模型。我们发现，在所有测试质量范围内，极坐标变换后的输入始终比标准笛卡尔图像产生更高的子晕探测率。对于质量在$10^9M_\odot \leq M \leq 10^{9.5}M_\odot$范围内的子晕，网络能够探测到的子晕比例增加了约15%。预训练网络的性能优于随机初始化网络，并且极坐标变换在低信噪比数据和低浓度子晕情况下均能持续提升网络性能。在子晕扰动最难检测的区间，例如低信噪比数据或包含低浓度子晕的系统，相对提升最为显著。这些结果表明，将强透镜图像表示为极坐标形式是一种计算成本低廉的方法，可以有效提升基于CNN的子晕检测性能。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：将强透镜图像表示为极坐标形式是一种计算成本低廉的方法，可以有效提升基于CNN的子晕检测性能，尤其在子晕扰动最难检测的弱信号场景下改善最为显著。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The architecture of the network used in this work, consisting of a ConvNeXt feature encoder and custom linear heads. The overall architecture consists of a series of convolutional stages and downsampling stages, as well as an initial stem that converts each non-overlapping 4×4 region of the input image into a learned feature vector, producing a downsampled feature map.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：本文所用网络的架构，由ConvNeXt特征编码器和自定义线性头组成。整体架构包括一系列卷积阶段和下采样阶段，以及一个初始茎，该茎将输入图像的每个非重叠4×4区域转换为学习到的特征向量，生成下采样的特征图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: An example of applying the polar transformation to an image. The left panel shows the original simulated observation from the dataset. The middle panel shows an example of the resampling grid overlayed on the original image. For visualization purposes, this grid has a lower resolution than what was used during the training process. The right panel shows the resulting polar-transformed image.

The legend entries denote Cartesian - random initialization, polar - random initialization, Cartesian - pretrained, polar - pretrained respectively. The solid lines represent the networks trained and evaluated on data generated with a single HST orbit, and the dashed lines represent the networks trained and evaluated on data generated with 50 HST orbits. Despite lower overall performance with respect to high signal-to-noise data, the polar transform retains its advantage.

Right: Contours of the 50% detection fraction for each of the four networks. Only the region of parameter space where the detection fraction varies is shown. As source magnitude decreases, and the signal-to-noise increases, the mass at which the network obtains a 50 per cent detection fraction decreases. This decrease is sharper for the networks using polar-transformed data.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：左图：在单次轨道数据（上）与50次轨道数据（下）上训练和评估的PPT和CPT网络的探测率热力图。右图：四个网络50%探测率的等高线。仅显示探测率变化的参数空间区域。随着源星等降低、信噪比增加，网络获得50%探测率的质量降低。对于使用极坐标变换数据的网络，这种降低更为显著。

title: A new $H_0$ measurement with SNe Requiem and Encore using Gravity.jl
summary: We present a strong-lensing (SL) analysis of the galaxy cluster MACS J0138.0-2155 (z=0.336), the first known lens cluster discovered to host two distinct multiply imaged Type Ia supernovae (SNe): SN Requiem and SN Encore. Both transients are located in the massive, multiply imaged red galaxy MRG-M0138 at z=1.949. The projected total mass of this cluster has been investigated with several independent lens models (Suyu+26; Pierel+26), using a sample of 23 spectroscopically confirmed multiple images from 8 background sources (0.767<z<3.420), identified from the HST and the JWST imaging data, and VLT/MUSE spectroscopy. In this work, we develop a new SL model based on a novel Bayesian parametric lens-modelling framework Gravity.jl, exploiting the same SL dataset. Our reference mass model accurately reproduces the observed image positions, with an image-plane rms image position residual of 0.24''. Assuming H0 = 70 km/s/Mpc, we predict the future reappearances of highly delayed SNe counter-images, finding Dt(1d,1a) = 3177_{-59}^{+78} d (May-September, 2032) for SN Encore and Dt(2d,2a) = 3938_{-77}^{+90} d (February-July, 2027) for SN Requiem. By allowing H0 to vary, and using the measured time delays of both SN Encore and SN Requiem together with their statistical uncertainties as observables, we infer the value of H0 jointly with the other lens-model free parameters. From this analysis, we obtain a new measurement of H0 = 67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc, consistent with the value inferred from the aforementioned independent lens models. This error is currently dominated by the large relative uncertainty on the measured time delays (>10%). The forthcoming reappearance of SN Requiem offers an immediate opportunity to significantly improve constraints on H0, provided that lens-model systematics are controlled. These results establish M0138 as a premier anchor for high-precision cluster-scale TDC.

title: A Strongly Lensed Ultra-faint Arc at $z \approx 10$ with an F200W excess in Abell S1063
summary: Strong gravitational lensing provides a powerful route to probing intrinsically faint galaxies during the first few hundred million years of cosmic history. In this Letter, we report the identification of GAR10, a highly magnified F115W-dropout galaxy at $z\approx10$ in the Abell S1063 cluster field, using deep JWST/NIRCam imaging from the GLIMPSE and GO-1840 programs. The source shows an unusually blue ultraviolet (UV) continuum and a significant F200W excess relative to adjacent bands. Under our high-magnification lensing solution, we infer a median magnification of $μ=43^{+78}_{-20}$, corresponding to an intrinsic UV magnitude of $M_{\rm UV}\approx-15.8$. We use exploratory Prospector SED modeling to examine two physically motivated interpretations of the observed photometry. In Case I, GAR10 is described by an extremely metal-poor, continuum-dominated stellar population at $z=10.75_{-0.34}^{+0.41}$, with a blue UV slope of $β=-2.92\pm0.12$ and a low metallicity of $\log(Z/Z_\odot)=-3.56_{-0.85}^{+0.65}$, consistent with an extremely metal-poor or Pop III-like continuum-dominated interpretation under the adopted priors. In Case II, GAR10 is interpreted as an extremely young (1--3 Myr), high-ionization galaxy at $z=10.45_{-0.21}^{+0.11}$, in which the F200W excess is produced by intense rest-frame UV emission lines, including CIV, HeII, and CIII]. Both cases can partially reproduce the current photometry within the adopted priors, but they imply distinct ionizing sources, enrichment histories, and possible contributions to cosmic reionization. GAR10 therefore represents a rare laboratory for studying ultra-faint galaxy formation at cosmic dawn. Future JWST/NIRSpec spectroscopy will be essential to distinguishing between the steep continuum and emission-line origins of the F200W excess.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜为探测宇宙最初几亿年期间本质暗淡的星系提供了强大途径。在本快报中，我们报告了在Abell S1063星系团场中，利用GLIMPSE和GO-1840项目的深JWST/NIRCam成像，识别出一个高度放大的F115W-dropout星系GAR10，其红移约为10。该源显示出异常蓝的紫外连续谱，以及相对于相邻波段的显著F200W过剩。根据我们的高放大率透镜解，我们推断中位放大率为μ=43^{+78}_{-20}，对应的内禀紫外星等为M_UV≈-15.8。我们使用探索性Prospector SED建模来检验观测测光数据的两种物理解释。在情形I中，GAR10被描述为一个在z=10.75_{-0.34}^{+0.41}处的极端贫金属、连续谱主导的星族，具有蓝的紫外斜率β=-2.92±0.12和低金属丰度log(Z/Z_⊙)=-3.56_{-0.85}^{+0.65}，这与在采用先验下极端贫金属或类Pop III连续谱主导的解释一致。在情形II中，GAR10被解释为一个在z=10.45_{-0.21}^{+0.11}处的极端年轻（1-3 Myr）、高电离星系，其中F200W过剩由强烈的静止系紫外发射线产生，包括CIV、HeII和CIII]。两种情形都能在采用先验下部分重现当前测光数据，但它们暗示了不同的电离源、增丰历史以及对宇宙再电离的可能贡献。因此，GAR10代表了研究宇宙黎明时期超暗星系形成的稀有实验室。未来的JWST/NIRSpec光谱对于区分F200W过剩的陡峭连续谱起源和发射线起源至关重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，GAR10是研究宇宙黎明时期超暗星系形成的稀有案例，两种解释对电离源、增丰历史和再电离贡献有不同意义，未来需JWST/NIRSpec光谱来区分F200W过剩的来源。

Left panel (Case I): A continuum-dominated, extremely metal-poor solution. The red curve shows a representative best-fit realization at \(z_{best}\approx 11.33\) . All physical quantities quoted for this panel are measured from this best-fit model spectrum rather than from the marginalized posterior medians. We therefore interpret this solution as an illustrative limiting case in which the F200W flux is dominated primarily by an ultra-blue stellar continuum, with negligible nebular-line contribution. Right panel (Case II): A lower-redshift, line-driven solution. The red curve shows the representative best-fit realization at \(z_{best}\approx 10.52\) . As in the left panel, all quoted quantities are measured from the best-fit model spectrum. A line-clean power-law fit to this best-fit spectrum gives a more moderate UV continuum slope of \(\beta_{best}=-2.58\) . This solution corresponds to an extremely young burst age of \(1\) – \(3\) Myr in the adopted Case II model setup. The apparent inverted Balmer break feature is therefore naturally associated with a very young, high-ionization stellar population with strong nebular emission. In this scenario, the F200W excess is reproduced by strong rest-frame UV nebular emission, primarily He II \(\lambda 1640\) and the C III] \(\lambda 1908\) , wit
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在两种探索性极限情景下，GAR10分量ab的最佳拟合Prospector SED建模。左面板（情形I）：连续谱主导的极端贫金属解。红线显示了在z_best≈11.33处的代表性最佳拟合实现。该面板中引用的所有物理量均来自该最佳拟合模型谱，而非来自边缘化后验中位数。对最佳拟合谱进行无发射线幂律拟合，得到异常蓝的紫外连续谱斜率β_best=-3.15，而最佳拟合恒星金属丰度达到[log_{10}(Z/Z_⊙)]_best≈-4.9。这些最佳拟合值与表1中报告的边缘化后验中位数（z=10.75^{+0.41}_{-0.34}，β=-2.92±0.12，log(Z/Z_⊙)=-3.56_{-0.85}^{+0.65}）不同，因为情形I的后验是非高斯的，并延伸到所采用的贫金属、无尘埃参数空间的边缘。因此，我们将此解解释为一个说明性极限情形，其中F200W流量主要来自超蓝恒星连续谱，而星云线贡献可忽略。右面板（情形II）：较低红移、线驱动的解。红线显示了在z_best≈10.52处的代表性最佳拟合实现。与左面板一样，所有引用的量均来自最佳拟合模型谱。对该最佳拟合谱进行无发射线幂律拟合，得到更适中的紫外连续谱斜率β_best=-2.58。此解对应于所采用情形II模型设置中极端年轻的爆发年龄1–3 Myr。因此，明显的倒巴尔默断裂特征自然地与具有强星云发射的非常年轻、高电离星族相关联。在此情景中，F200W过剩由强的静止系紫外星云发射重现，主要是He II λ1640和C III] λ1908。

title: Disentangling the dark and stellar mass through precise lens modelling of the JWST observation of lensed quasar WFI2033--4723
summary: We use high-resolution JWST/NIRCam imaging and measured time delays to model the quadruply imaged quasar WFI2033--4723 with a composite stellar plus dark-matter mass model. We first construct an elliptical power-law baseline model and recover Fermat-potential differences (fpd) consistent with previous HST-based and JWST-based analyses, providing a reference scale for composite modelling. We then replace the total mass profile with a physically motivated decomposition in which the stellar mass follows a multi-Gaussian expansion of the lens light, with a free radial mass-to-light gradient, and the dark matter is described by a generalized Navarro--Frenk--White (gNFW) halo. Using two external cosmological priors, Planck+DESI and Pantheon+SH0ES, the measured time delays constrain the mass-sheet-transformation freedom that would otherwise damage the stellar--dark-matter decomposition. In both cosmological cases, the stellar normalization lies between the expectations for Chabrier and Salpeter initial mass functions, while the radial mass-to-light gradient is not strongly required by the data (mildly positive). The dark matter halo has an inner slope $γ_{\rm in}\simeq1.3$, steeper than a standard NFW cusp, and the main astrophysical conclusions are insensitive to the adopted cosmological prior. This work shows that composite time-delay lens modelling can effectively separate baryons from dark matter. As a qualitative check, we reverse the logic and use our composite lens model without kinematic information to infer the cosmology instead. However, the strong degeneracy between $H_0$ and the halo scale radius $R_s$ prevents a robust standalone constraint.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST/NIRCam高分辨率成像和测量到的时间延迟，通过复合恒星加暗物质质量模型对四重成像类星体WFI2033-4723进行建模。研究发现暗物质晕内坡较陡（γ_in≈1.3），恒星质量标度介于Chabrier和Salpeter初始质量函数之间，并证明了复合时间延迟透镜模型能有效分离重子和暗物质。

AI.result: 恒星标度介于Chabrier和Salpeter IMF之间，径向质光比梯度不强；暗物质晕内坡γ_in≈1.3，比标准NFW尖点更陡；主要结论对宇宙学先验不敏感。作为定性检验，反向使用复合透镜模型约束宇宙学，但H₀与晕尺度半径R_s之间存在强简并。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用高分辨率JWST/NIRCam成像和测量的时间延迟，通过复合恒星加暗物质质量模型对四重成像类星体WFI2033--4723进行建模。我们首先构建了一个椭圆幂律基线模型，并恢复了与先前基于HST和JWST分析一致的费马势差（fpd），为复合建模提供了参考尺度。然后，我们将总质量分布替换为物理动机的分解，其中恒星质量遵循透镜光的多元高斯展开，具有自由的径向质光比梯度，而暗物质由广义Navarro--Frenk--White（gNFW）晕描述。利用两个外部宇宙学先验（Planck+DESI和Pantheon+SH0ES），测量的时间延迟约束了质量片变换自由度，否则该自由度会损害恒星-暗物质分解。在两种宇宙学情况下，恒星归一化介于Chabrier和Salpeter初始质量函数的预期之间，而径向质光比梯度并非数据强烈要求（轻微正）。暗物质晕具有内斜率$γ_{\rm in}\simeq1.3$，比标准NFW尖点更陡，主要天体物理学结论对所采用的宇宙学先验不敏感。这项工作表明，复合时间延迟透镜建模可以有效分离重子和暗物质。作为定性检验，我们反转逻辑，使用无运动学信息的复合透镜模型来推断宇宙学。然而，$H_0$与晕尺度半径$R_s$之间的强简并性阻止了稳健的独立约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：复合时间延迟透镜建模能有效分离重子和暗物质，但仅靠透镜模型（无运动学信息）不足以稳健约束宇宙学参数。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Priors used for the EPL baseline and the star+gNFW time-delay model. \(\mathcal{U}\) and \({TN}\) denote uniform and truncated Gaussian priors. The singular isothermal sphere (SIS) perturber priors are shared by both mass models. Following the notation of Li et al. ( 2026 ) , \(\Upsilon_{\kappa}\) denotes the overall scale applied to the normalized stellar MGE in convergence. For the cosmological priors, the table lists only the marginal \(H_{0}\) constraints for compactness, while the inference uses the corresponding two-dimensional posterior constraints in the \((H_{0},\Omega_{m})\) plane as priors. The inner three MGE light components are fixed during the Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (HMC) sampling stage and the outer two MGE light components are free.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于EPL基线和恒星+gNFW时间延迟模型的先验。\(\mathcal{U}\)和\({TN}\)表示均匀和截断高斯先验。奇异等温球（SIS）扰动体先验由两个质量模型共享。遵循Li等人（2026）的符号，\(\Upsilon_{\kappa}\)表示应用于归一化恒星MGE收敛的整体尺度。对于宇宙学先验，该表仅列出边缘\(H_{0}\)约束以保持紧凑，而推断使用\((H_{0},\Omega_{m})\)平面中相应的二维后验约束作为先验。在哈密顿蒙特卡洛（HMC）采样阶段，内部三个MGE光分量固定，外部两个MGE光分量自由。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Stepwise image modelling of WFI2033–4723 in the JWST/NIRCam F115W band. Each row corresponds to one modelling stage, and the columns show, from left to right, the lens-light-subtracted data, the lensed image model, the normalized residuals, and the reconstructed source. Step 1 uses a parametric source-light model. Step 2 replaces the source with a pixelated source reconstruction. Step 3 adds a correction to the PSF kernel. Step 4 uses the PSF-corrected model with an updated noise map that includes additional PSF-related uncertainty. All axes are given in arcseconds.

authors: the LSST Dark Energy Science Collaboration
title: Strong Lensing Tomography: Double and pseudo multi-source plane strong gravitational lensing to constrain dark energy
comment: 44 pages, 12 figures, to be submitted to JCAP
summary: Tomographic measurements of gravitational lensing with different lens and source redshift distributions contain crucial information about the universe's relative expansion rate, and hence dark energy. While this technique is well-established in weak lensing, its application to strong lensing has traditionally focused on Double Source Plane Lenses (DSPLs). However, DSPLs are exceedingly rare and fundamentally limited by the Mass-Sheet Degeneracy (MSD), a systematic uncertainty underexplored in previous literature. To overcome these challenges, we introduce Pseudo Double-Source Plane Lenses (PDSPLs): pairs of independent single-source plane lenses with self-similar deflectors. This generalizes the DSPL formalism to the $\sim 10^5$ galaxy-galaxy lenses expected from upcoming surveys like LSST, Euclid, and Roman. Unlike true DSPLs, PDSPLs are free from the intermediate source mass problem by construction, eliminating the associated secondary MSD and the need for multi-plane ray tracing. We incorporate the deflector galaxy's MSD into a hierarchical forecasting framework, demonstrating that this degeneracy severely degrades constraints from small DSPL samples, thus motivating our PDSPL statistical approach. We forecast constraints on the dark energy equation of state under a Flat $w_0w_a$CDM cosmology. The LSST 10-year photometric sample alone achieves $σ(w_0) \sim 0.45$, while simultaneously constraining the MSD parameter and deflector power-law slope to $\sim 2\%$. Adding a prior $\mathcal{N}(0.3, 0.05)$ on $Ω_{\rm m}$ -- simulating combination with external probes like CMB, BAO, or SNe Ia -- tightens this to $σ(w_0) \sim 0.29$, competitive with current Stage III weak lensing analyses. Notably, this massive photometric sample outperforms smaller subsets with precise spectroscopic follow-up (e.g., from 4MOST), confirming statistical volume dominates over per-pair precision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“伪双源平面透镜”（PDSPLs），通过配对独立单源平面透镜克服传统双源平面透镜（DSPLs）稀少且受质量片简并（MSD）限制的问题。基于LSST等巡天预计的~10^5个星系-星系透镜，结合层次化预测框架，在Flat w0waCDM宇宙学下实现对暗能量状态方程参数的约束（σ(w0)~0.45，加入外部先验后~0.29），并证明统计样本量优于单对精度。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 具有不同透镜和源红移分布的引力透镜层析测量包含了关于宇宙相对膨胀速率以及暗能量的关键信息。虽然该技术在弱透镜中已得到充分确立，但其在强透镜中的应用传统上集中于双源面透镜（DSPL）。然而，DSPL极为罕见，并且从根本上受到质量片简并（MSD）的限制，这是一种在以往文献中未被充分探索的系统性不确定性。为克服这些挑战，我们引入了伪双源面透镜（PDSPL）：即具有自相似偏转体的独立单源面透镜对。这将DSPL形式推广到即将到来的巡天（如LSST、Euclid和Roman）预期的约10^5个星系-星系透镜。与真正的DSPL不同，PDSPL在构造上不存在中间源质量问题，从而消除了相关的次级MSD以及多面光线追踪的需求。我们将偏转星系的MSD纳入一个分层预测框架，证明这种简并会严重削弱小样本DSPL的约束能力，从而激励我们的PDSPL统计方法。我们在平坦的w0waCDM宇宙学下预测了对暗能量状态方程的约束。仅LSST 10年测光样本就实现了σ(w0) ~ 0.45，同时将MSD参数和偏转体幂律斜率约束到约2%。添加一个关于Ωm的先验N(0.3, 0.05)——模拟与外部探针（如CMB、BAO或SNe Ia）的结合——将这一约束收紧至σ(w0) ~ 0.29，与当前第三阶段弱透镜分析具有竞争力。值得注意的是，这一庞大的测光样本优于具有精确光谱后续观测（例如来自4MOST）的较小子集，证实了统计体量优于单对测量精度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：PDSPL为克服DSPL的稀有性和MSD问题提供了可行路径，利用即将到来的大规模巡天数据，有望实现有竞争力的暗能量约束，并证明统计样本量比单对测量精度更重要。

title: GIGA-Lens 2.0: Strong-Lens Modeling on Multiple GPU Nodes
summary: We present GIGA-Lens 2.0: a major upgrade to the GPU-accelerated Bayesian framework for modeling strong lensing systems that allows it to be run across multiple GPU nodes. We have succeeded in running GIGA-Lens 2.0 on 128 nodes or 512 A100 GPUs. We demonstrate the speed benefits of this new version, and apply them to modeling 100 simulated systems and a real system, DESI J238.5690+04.7276. We also present other changes to the framework that have yielded further improvement on performance.

AI.tldr: GIGA-Lens 2.0 是GPU加速贝叶斯强透镜建模框架的重大升级，支持多GPU节点运行（最多128节点/512个A100 GPU），在100个模拟系统和真实系统DESI J238.5690+04.7276上展示了速度优势。
AI.motivation: 提升GIGA-Lens框架的计算性能，使其能够跨多个GPU节点运行，以处理更大规模的强透镜建模问题。
AI.method: 将GIGA-Lens框架升级为分布式版本，支持在128个节点（512个A100 GPU）上并行运行，并进行了其他性能优化改进。
AI.result: 成功在128节点/512个A100 GPU上运行，并在100个模拟系统和真实系统DESI J238.5690+04.7276上验证了速度提升效果。
AI.conclusion: GIGA-Lens 2.0通过多GPU分布式并行计算显著提升了强透镜建模效率，为更大规模的数据处理提供了可能。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Schematic of distributed computation for the SVI stage of the GIGA-Lens 2.0 pipeline, broken down into six steps, each represented by a box. We show \(N\) GPU nodes with a total of 4 \(N\) GPUs. A device is synonymous with a single GPU. Each step is represented by a box; the steps where computation takes place on individual devices are shown as blue and the yellow box is the step where communications among all devices, including across nodes, are required. The communication among the GPUs on one node is accomplished via JAX pmap , whereas the communication across multiple GPU nodes is accomplished via JAX shard_map . All the GPUs are shown in box 2. This box is replicated in steps 3 and 4, but for brevity, we do not show individual GPUs. The communication among devices and across nodes takes place in step 5, the yellow box. So far we have successfully run GIGA-Lens 2.0 on a total of \(N=128\) nodes, or 512 GPUs.

title: Probing Magnetic Fields In and Around Galaxies Near and Far
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026 (arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no:AASKAII/Mao01
summary: In order to understand the magnetization of galaxies and the role of magnetic fields in feedback processes that govern star formation and galaxy evolution, it is essential to have a comprehensive census of magnetic fields in and around galaxies from the nearby Universe to high redshifts. In this chapter, we outline the science goals, strategies, techniques, and observational requirements with SKA AA4 for (1) a homogeneous polarimetric survey of nearby galaxies - mapping both the diffuse polarized emission as well as producing a dense RM grid within the virial radius; (2) a survey of the interstellar magnetic fields in distant galaxies targeting strong lensing systems with polarized lensed quasars, as well as a general statistical back-illumination survey to probe the redshift evolution of magnetic fields in the CGM. These proposed observations will serve as a major step towards understanding the co-evolution of galaxies and their magnetic fields over cosmic time and provide constraints on galactic dynamo theories.

AI.tldr: 本文概述了利用SKA AA4进行星系磁场观测的科学目标与策略，包括对近邻星系的偏振巡天以及通过强引力透镜系统探测高红移星系磁场，以理解星系与磁场的共演化。
AI.motivation: 理解星系的磁化以及磁场在恒星形成和星系演化中的反馈作用，需要从近邻宇宙到高红移全面普查星系内外的磁场。

AI.conclusion: SKA AA4的上述观测方案是揭示磁场在星系形成与演化中作用的重要里程碑。

title: First measurement of narrow-line flux ratios for a lensed quasar with JWST/NIRSpec IFS
comment: 18 pages, 9 figures, submitted to Physical Review D
summary: Strong gravitational lensing is a powerful probe of dark matter (DM) structure on subgalactic scales: in particular, statistics of flux-ratio anomalies (discrepancies between mass model predictions and observed flux ratios) in quadruply imaged quasars are sensitive to perturbations by low-mass DM halos down to $\sim 10^6 M_\odot$. Studies leveraging these anomalies require high-quality flux-ratio measurements from an emission region insensitive to stellar microlensing. In this paper, we present the first measurement of narrow-line flux ratios for a gravitationally lensed quasar using JWST/NIRSpec with Integral Field Spectroscopy (IFS), targeting the well-studied system RXJ1131$-$1231. Flux ratios are extracted from the [S III] 9071/9533 $Å$ narrow-line doublet - the first use of this doublet for substructure studies - by performing a full lens model reconstruction to isolate the unresolved nuclear emission from extended narrow-line emission. The resulting spectra are jointly modeled using $\texttt{lensqso-specfit}$, a publicly available software package introduced in this work for the simultaneous spectral fitting of multiple lensed quasar images. We achieve $\sim$ 5% uncertainties on the flux ratios, comparable to the precision of JWST/MIRI warm dust measurements, and detect a clear anomaly in the cusp images relative to a standard smooth lens model. Our results are in good agreement with previous narrow-line measurements and broadly consistent with JWST/MIRI warm dust flux ratios, with marginal ($\sim 2-3σ$) deviations. We demonstrate how such shifts between differently sized emission regions may be enhanced by small ($\sim 10$ pc) spatial offsets. Our method is generalizable to other systems with existing or future IFS observations, and the combination of narrow-line and warm dust flux ratios offers a new avenue for improving DM constraints with flux-ratio anomaly statistics.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST/NIRSpec积分场光谱首次测量了四重像引力透镜类星体RXJ1131-1231的[S III]窄线通量比（~5%精度），发现尖点图像存在明显异常，并开发了公开的联合光谱拟合软件lensqso-specfit。窄线与暖尘埃通量比的联合为暗物质小尺度结构研究提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 强引力透镜的流量比异常对亚星系尺度上的低质量暗物质晕（~10^6 M⊙）非常敏感，但此前缺乏对星系数微透镜不敏感的高精度窄线流量比测量方法。
AI.method: 利用JWST/NIRSpec积分场光谱观测RXJ1131-1231，首次提取[S III] 9071/9533 Å窄线双线流量比；通过完整透镜模型重构分离未分辨的核区发射与延展窄线发射；使用新开发的公开软件lensqso-specfit对多个透镜像进行联合光谱拟合。
AI.result: 获得了~5%精度的窄线流量比，探测到尖点图像相对于平滑透镜模型的显著异常；与JWST/MIRI暖尘埃测量结果在~2-3σ水平上存在偏差；发现不同尺寸发射区之间的偏移可能被~10 pc的空间错位放大。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜是探测亚星系尺度暗物质（DM）结构的有力工具：特别是四重成像类星体中流量比异常（质量模型预测与观测流量比之间的差异）的统计对低质量暗物质晕（低至约10^6 M_⊙）的扰动敏感。利用这些异常的研究需要来自对恒星微透镜不敏感的发射区的高质量流量比测量。本文中，我们首次利用JWST/NIRSpec积分场光谱（IFS）测量了引力透镜类星体的窄线流量比，目标为研究充分的系统RXJ1131−1231。流量比从[S III] 9071/9533 Å窄线双线中提取——这是该双线首次用于子结构研究——通过执行完整的透镜模型重建以将未分辨的核发射与延展的窄线发射分离。所得光谱使用lensqso-specfit进行联合建模，这是一个在本工作中引入的公开可用软件包，用于多个透镜类星体图像的同时光谱拟合。我们实现了约5%的流量比不确定度，与JWST/MIRI暖尘埃测量的精度相当，并检测到相对于标准光滑透镜模型的尖点图像中的明显异常。我们的结果与之前的窄线测量高度一致，并与JWST/MIRI暖尘埃流量比大致相符，存在边际（约2-3σ）偏差。我们展示了这种不同大小发射区之间的偏移如何可能被小的（约10 pc）空间偏移增强。我们的方法可推广至其他具有或未来将有IFS观测的系统，窄线与暖尘埃流量比的组合为利用流量比异常统计改进暗物质约束提供了新途径。

title: Constraints on the Gas Geometry Surrounding Little Red Dots through Narrow-Line Diagnostics
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, submitted to ApJ
summary: Little Red Dots (LRDs) are a recently identified population of high-redshift sources, with a common interpretation being accreting black holes embedded within a spherical, optically thick gas envelope. Within this framework, some models propose that the continuum arises from the dense-gas envelope, where hard ionizing radiation from the central engine is reprocessed into a stellar-like photosphere with an effective temperature of $\sim$5000 K. This implies that both the UV continuum and narrow-line emission are then powered by the host galaxy rather than an exposed central engine. To test whether this is consistent with the observed narrow-line ratios, we analyze multiple line diagnostics for a sample of $\sim$20 LRDs with high signal-to-noise NIRSpec grating spectra. We find that at least 40\% of the LRDs have line ratios pointing toward high ionization parameter and electron temperature, with a further 15\% also falling in the AGN regime for the O\textsc{i}/H$α$ diagnostic, indicative of harder ionizing radiation. These line ratios are incompatible with stellar photoionization from a star-forming host alone. This suggests lower density channels within the gas envelope through which high energy photons can escape and excite the surrounding narrow-line emitting gas. At the same time, most LRDs lack strong high-ionization line emission, with He\,\textsc{ii}/H$β$ $\lesssim0.1$, consistent with an ionizing spectrum softer than that of a standard AGN. Together, these results disfavour a uniform gas envelope with a covering fraction of unity, and instead point to a more complex geometry that gives rise to anisotropic ionizing radiation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析约20个Little Red Dots（LRDs）的高信噪比NIRSpec光栅光谱，发现至少40%的LRDs具有高电离参数和电子温度的线比，15%的LRDs在O I/Hα诊断中落入AGN区域，表明其存在比恒星电离更硬的辐射源，因此不支持单一、全覆盖的气体包层模型，而指向更复杂的各向异性几何结构。
AI.motivation: 检验LRDs的窄线比是否与“连续谱来自密气体包层、UV连续谱和窄线发射由宿主星系而非暴露的中央引擎驱动”的模型一致。
AI.method: 对约20个LRDs的高信噪比NIRSpec光栅光谱进行多线诊断分析。
AI.result: 至少40%的LRDs线比指向高电离参数和电子温度；15%的LRDs在O I/Hα诊断中落入AGN区域；大多数LRDs缺乏强高电离线发射（He II/Hβ ≤ 0.1）。
AI.conclusion: 这些线比与恒星电离不相容，表明气体包层内存在低密度通道，高能光子可逃逸并激发周围窄线气体；不支持均匀全覆盖的气体包层，而指向更复杂的各向异性电离辐射几何结构。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 小红点（LRDs）是最近发现的一类高红移源，通常被解释为嵌入在球形光学厚气体包层中的吸积黑洞。在此框架下，一些模型提出连续谱来自稠密气体包层，其中来自中心引擎的硬电离辐射被再处理成有效温度约为5000 K的类恒星光球。这意味着紫外连续谱和窄线发射均由宿主星系而非暴露的中心引擎提供能量。为了检验这是否与观测到的窄线比一致，我们分析了约20个具有高信噪比NIRSpec光栅光谱的LRD样本的多种线诊断。我们发现至少40%的LRD的线比指向高电离参数和电子温度，另有15%在O I/Hα诊断中也落入AGN区域，表明存在更硬的电离辐射。这些线比与仅来自恒星形成宿主的光电离不相容。这表明气体包层内存在低密度通道，高能光子可通过这些通道逃逸并激发周围的窄线发射气体。同时，大多数LRD缺乏强的高电离线发射，He II/Hβ ≤ 0.1，这与比标准AGN更软的电离谱一致。综合来看，这些结果不支持覆盖因子为1的均匀气体包层，而是指向更复杂的几何结构，产生各向异性的电离辐射。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：这些线比与恒星电离不相容，表明气体包层内存在低密度通道，高能光子可逃逸并激发周围窄线气体；不支持均匀全覆盖的气体包层，而指向更复杂的各向异性电离辐射几何结构。

A dash (–) indicates that the relevant lines were not detected at sufficient S/N (less than \(3\) ), and the ellipsis ( \(\cdots\) ) indicates that the line lies outside the wavelength coverage. a a footnotetext: Sources are classified as AGN if \(\log\) (He ii /H \(\beta\) ) \(>-1.22\) .

Here non-detections are treated as non-AGN, so the percentages represent lower limits. The bar plot on the top right shows the number of LRDs with overlapping diagnostics. At least 38% of LRDs have line ratios consistent with high ionization parameter and electron temperature but with a non-AGN-like ratio for the O1 diagnostic. The bar plot on the bottom left shows the number of LRDs classified as AGN-like by each diagnostic individually.

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: A cross section of the possible gaseous structure surrounding LRDs. Incident radiation that goes through the higher gas columns will result in the Balmer break and absorption features observed in LRDs. The AGN-like line ratios suggest that there are low-density channels, possibly analogous to funnel-like regions, where the incident radiation is not reprocessed.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：LRD周围可能的气体结构横截面。穿过较高气体柱的入射辐射将导致LRD中观测到的巴尔末跳变和吸收特征。类AGN线比表明存在低密度通道，可能类似于漏斗状区域，其中入射辐射未被再处理。

title: A redshift of z=3.20 for the bright arc in eMACSJ2229.9-0808: Comment on Wagner & Falco (2026) "Hamilton's Object revisited: A challenging source redshift of a strong lensing configuration"
comment: Comment article in A&A, in press. Refers to arXiv:2604.19867
summary: We re-analyse near-infrared and optical spectroscopy from the Subaru, Gemini, and Keck telescopes of the bright gravitational arc seen in the z=0.62 X-ray cluster eMACSJ2229.9-0808. The 22 strongest spectral features we identify uniquely determine the redshift of the galaxy as z=3.20, as previously reported by Ebeling et al. (2025), not z=0.82 as claimed by Wagner & Falco (2026).

AI.tldr: 重新分析eMACSJ2229.9-0808星系团中强引力弧的光谱数据，确认该星系红移为z=3.20，而非先前某研究声称的z=0.82。
AI.motivation: 解决关于该强引力弧星系红移的争议，澄清其真实红移值。
AI.method: 重新分析来自Subaru、Gemini和Keck望远镜的近红外和光学光谱数据，识别22条最强光谱特征以确定红移。

title: Strong-lensing effects in high-redshift massive black-hole binary population inference
summary: High-redshift massive black-hole binary (MBHB) mergers provide a probe of black-hole seed formation and early galaxy assembly, but the population detected by LISA can be modified by galaxy-scale strong lensing. We quantify this effect for MBHB mergers at $10\leq z\leq20$ and assess its impact on the inference of intrinsic formation-channel fractions. We use four channels, corresponding to light- and heavy-seed scenarios with delayed and non-delayed mergers, and compute 4-year LISA-detectable event numbers with and without strong lensing. To bracket the uncertain lens population, we compare a conservative velocity-dispersion-function (VDF) prescription with an optimistic halo-mass-function (HMF)-based prescription. We consider a reference mixture with equal seed-channel weights and additional mixtures in which the intrinsic seed population is weighted toward selected formation channels, and jointly infer the formation fractions and the strength of the lensing contribution. Strong lensing does not affect all channels equally: it can change the detected channel mixture as well as the total number of detections. This effect is weak for the conservative VDF prescription, but becomes significant in the high-lensing-rate HMF case, where neglecting strong lensing can bias the recovered formation fractions. The inference precision depends on the underlying intrinsic channel composition, while the lensing contribution is more accurately recovered in the high-lensing-rate case. These results indicate that galaxy-scale strong-lensing effects and event-count information should be included when using high-redshift MBHB detections to infer intrinsic formation-channel fractions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了强引力透镜效应对LISA探测器在红移10-20处探测大质量黑洞双星并合事件的影响，发现忽略透镜效应会偏差推断的形成通道比例，尤其在高透镜率情况下。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 高红移大质量黑洞双星（MBHB）并合为研究黑洞种子形成和早期星系组装提供了探针，但LISA探测到的种群可能受到星系级强引力透镜效应的影响。我们量化了这种效应对红移$10\leq z\leq20$的MBHB并合的影响，并评估了其对内在形成通道比例推断的冲击。我们使用了四个通道，分别对应轻种子和重种子场景，并考虑了延迟与非延迟并合，计算了有无强透镜效应下4年LISA可探测事件数。为了涵盖不确定的透镜种群，我们比较了保守的速度色散函数（VDF）描述与乐观的晕质量函数（HMF）描述。我们考虑了一个种子通道权重相等的参考混合模型，以及内在种子种群偏向特定形成通道的其他混合模型，并联合推断形成比例和透镜贡献的强度。强透镜效应并非对所有通道影响相同：它可能改变探测到的通道混合比例以及总探测数。这种效应在保守的VDF描述下较弱，但在高透镜率的HMF情况下变得显著，忽略强透镜效应可能导致恢复的形成比例产生偏差。推断精度取决于内在通道组成，而透镜贡献在高透镜率情况下恢复得更准确。这些结果表明，在利用高红移MBHB探测推断内在形成通道比例时，应纳入星系级强透镜效应和事件计数信息。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：利用高红移MBHB探测推断内在形成通道比例时，需纳入星系级强透镜效应和事件计数信息。

title: VENUS: an ultra-faint galaxy hosting the metal-poor type II supernova at $z=5.13$ Witnessing the initial metal enrichment with extremely frequent core-collapse supernovae?
comment: Submitted to ApJ. Comments are welcome!
summary: We present the first characterization of the host galaxy of a recently discovered type IIP SN at $z=5.13$ (SN Eos). SN Eos and its host galaxy are gravitationally lensed and multiply imaged. The total magnification $μ\sim53$ enables spatially resolving the system, allowing us to localize the core-collapse supernova (CCSN) position and to characterize its local environment within an early galaxy. Our observation reveals that the host is an ultra-faint ($M_{\rm UV}=-14.4\pm0.3$ mag) Lyman-$α$ emitter with a very high equivalent width. The host galaxy also shows very weak [O iii]4959,5007 lines despite an H$α$ line detection ([O iii]5007/H$β<0.7$ with case B recombination). Assuming that the weak [O iii] is due to low gas-phase metallicity given the low-metallicity of SN Eos itself, SN Eos plausibly marks the formation and explosion of a metal-poor star in an extremely metal-poor environment ($<1\ \%\ Z_\odot$), facilitating the initial stages of the chemical enrichment of the host. Finding the CCSN in such an ultra-faint galaxy at $z=5.13$ also indicates that the SN rate could be considerably higher in high-$z$, metal-poor environments, potentially implying e.g., a $Z$-dependent IMF, $Z$-dependent massive star explodability, or runaway stellar collisions in dense star clusters. Without lensing, only SN Eos would be detectable and the host would be below the detection limit in any NIRCam surveys ever performed. The Eos host galaxy can thus be representative of the origin of {\it hostless} supernovae frequently found in JWST blank field surveys.

AI.tldr: 本文首次表征了红移z=5.13的IIP型超新星Eos及其引力透镜主星系，发现该星系是一个极端贫金属（<1%太阳丰度）的紫外超暗Lyman-α发射体，SN Eos的发现表明高红移贫金属环境中超新星发生率可能显著更高，并可能解释JWST巡天中频繁发现的"无宿主"超新星现象。
AI.motivation: 对高红移（z=5.13）超新星Eos的宿主星系进行首次表征，以理解早期宇宙中超新星爆发环境及其对星系化学增丰的贡献。
AI.method: 利用引力透镜效应（总放大率μ~53）对SN Eos及其宿主星系进行高分辨率空间解析，定位核塌缩超新星位置并表征其局域环境；通过光谱观测分析宿主星系的紫外光度、Lyman-α发射线等值宽度、[O III]与Hα谱线强度等特征。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们首次描述了最近在红移z=5.13处发现的IIP型超新星（SN Eos）的宿主星系。SN Eos及其宿主星系受到引力透镜效应并产生多重成像。总放大率μ~53使我们能够对该系统进行空间分辨，从而定位核坍缩超新星（CCSN）的位置，并表征其在早期星系内的局部环境。我们的观测揭示，该宿主是一个极暗弱（M_UV=-14.4±0.3 mag）的莱曼α发射体，具有非常高的等值宽度。尽管探测到了Hα线，但宿主星系的[O III]4959,5007线非常弱（在B型复合条件下[O III]5007/Hβ<0.7）。假设弱的[O III]是由于低气体相金属丰度（与SN Eos本身的低金属丰度一致），那么SN Eos很可能标志着在极端贫金属环境（<1% Z_⊙）中一颗贫金属恒星的形成与爆发，从而推动了宿主星系化学增丰的初始阶段。在红移z=5.13的极暗弱星系中发现CCSN也表明，在高红移、贫金属环境中，超新星发生率可能相当高，这可能暗示例如依赖于金属丰度的初始质量函数、依赖于金属丰度的大质量恒星可爆炸性，或致密星团中的逃逸恒星碰撞。如果没有引力透镜效应，只有SN Eos本身可被探测到，而宿主星系将低于任何已进行的NIRCam巡天的探测极限。因此，Eos宿主星系可能代表了JWST空白场巡天中频繁发现的“无宿主”超新星的典型起源。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，SN Eos标志着极端贫金属环境中贫金属恒星的形成与爆发，推动了宿主星系的早期化学增丰；高红移贫金属环境中超新星发生率可能更高，暗示恒星初始质量函数或大质量恒星爆炸性可能依赖金属丰度，或致密星团中存在逃逸恒星碰撞；此类极暗弱星系可作为JWST巡天中“无宿主”超新星的代表性起源。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: JWST /NIRCam images of the SN Eos host galaxy. Left : the NIRCam RGB image (blue: F115W+F150W, green: F200W+F277W, red: F356W+F444W). The critical curve at \(z=5.13\) is shown in yellow, obtained from the latest lens model (Allingham et al. , 2026 ) . SN Eos stands out as the bright and red, doubly-imaged source. The source is quintuply imaged in total, and the highest two magnification images (image 1 and image 2) near the critical line are magnified by \(\mu\sim 27\) . The NIRSpec follow-up observation was taken with the S200A1 fixed-slit via the program DD-9493, and their slit positions are denoted by the white rectangles. The cutout image is \(4.\!^{\prime\prime}0\) wide. Middle : NIRCam stacked image of the rest-frame UV (F090W+F115W+F150W). The host galaxy is marginally detected at the same position of SN Eos . Red circles have a \(r=0.\!^{\prime\prime}07\) radius. Right : NIRCam stacked image of strong rest-optical emission line filters with point-source subtraction. With point-source subtraction, a lensed arc structure can be seen symmetrically imaged across the critical line. The blue contour presents the moment-zero map of the Ly \(\alpha\) line taken with VLT/MUSE. The Ly \(\alpha\) line emission is spatially offset from the position of the UV clump and SN Eos , and associated with the lensed arc structure.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：SN Eos宿主星系的JWST/NIRCam图像。左图：NIRCam RGB图像（蓝色：F115W+F150W，绿色：F200W+F277W，红色：F356W+F444W）。黄色曲线显示了在\(z=5.13\)处的临界线，来自最新的透镜模型（Allingham等人，2026）。SN Eos表现为明亮且红色的双像源。该源总共被五重成像，靠近临界线的两个最高放大率像（像1和像2）被放大\(\mu\sim 27\)倍。NIRSpec后续观测通过DD-9493项目使用S200A1固定狭缝进行，其狭缝位置由白色矩形标出。剪裁图像宽度为\(4.\!^{\prime\prime}0\)。中图：静止系紫外波段（F090W+F115W+F150W）的NIRCam叠加图像。宿主星系在SN Eos的同一位置被微弱探测到。红色圆圈半径为\(r=0.\!^{\prime\prime}07\)。右图：经过点源减除的强静止光学发射线滤光片NIRCam叠加图像。经过点源减除后，可以看到一个透镜弧结构对称地成像在临界线两侧。蓝色等高线显示了VLT/MUSE拍摄的Ly \(\alpha\)线的零阶矩图。Ly \(\alpha\)线发射在空间上偏离了紫外团块和SN Eos的位置，并与透镜弧结构相关联。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: JWST /NIRSpec PRISM spectrum of SN Eos + its host galaxy. (A) the full 1D spectrum of SN Eos + host. The spectrum in image 1 (blue), image 2 (red), and the composite spectrum (black) are shown. All spectra are corrected for the gravitational lensing effect. The orange curve shows the typical galaxy spectrum of faint galaxies at \(z\sim 5\) in the NIRSpec PRISM resolution (Roberts-Borsani et al. , 2024 ) , scaled to match the UV flux level of the SN Eos host galaxy. (B) the rest-UV spectrum of the host. Although SN Eos outshines the host galaxy in rest-frame optical ( \(\lambda_{rest}\gtrsim 3700\) Å; gray shaded), the host galaxy is clearly detected in rest UV, with no time variability between the epoch of the NIRCam observation (red filled circle) and the NIRSpec observation. (C) NIRSpec spectral modeling around (rest-frame) 5000 Å of the combined spectrum (black; image 1 + image 2). The spectrum is well modeled with the type IIP SN component (black body continuum with a broad P-cygni H \(\beta\) and the Fe ii 5169 absorption; blue curve), leaving only minimal residual for the host [O iii ]4959,5007 line (red filled step). The [O iii ] line is considerably weaker than the prediction by the scaled typical galaxy spectrum (orange curve). (D) H \(\alpha\) line profile modeling. Unlike [O iii ], the H \(\alpha\) line profile is well modeled with the host galaxy (i.e., narrow) H \(\alpha\) contribution, on top of the broad P-cyg H \(\alpha\) line from the SN Eos . The H \(\alpha\) flux is roughly consistent with the prediction by the scaled reference spectrum (orange).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：SN Eos及其宿主星系的JWST/NIRSpec PRISM光谱。(A) SN Eos+宿主的完整一维光谱。显示了像1（蓝色）、像2（红色）和复合光谱（黑色）的光谱。所有光谱均已校正引力透镜效应。橙色曲线显示了NIRSpec PRISM分辨率下红移\(z\sim 5\)处暗弱星系的典型星系光谱（Roberts-Borsani等人，2024），已缩放以匹配SN Eos宿主星系的紫外流量水平。(B) 宿主的静止系紫外光谱。尽管SN Eos在静止光学波段（\(\lambda_{rest}\gtrsim 3700\) Å；灰色阴影）比宿主星系更亮，但宿主星系在静止紫外波段被清晰探测到，且在NIRCam观测历元（红色实心圆）和NIRSpec观测历元之间没有时间变化。(C) 复合光谱（黑色；像1+像2）在（静止系）5000 Å附近的NIRSpec光谱建模。该光谱很好地被IIP型超新星成分（具有宽P-cygni H \(\beta\)线和Fe ii 5169吸收的黑体连续谱；蓝色曲线）建模，仅留下宿主[O III]4959,5007线的最小残差（红色实心阶梯）。[O III]线明显弱于按比例缩放的典型星系光谱（橙色曲线）的预测。(D) H \(\alpha\)线轮廓建模。与[O III]不同，H \(\alpha\)线轮廓可以很好地用宿主星系（即窄）H \(\alpha\)贡献加上来自SN Eos的宽P-cyg H \(\alpha\)线来建模。H \(\alpha\)流量大致与按比例缩放的参考光谱（橙色）的预测一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The Ly \(\alpha\) line profile taken with VLT/MUSE, extracted for image 1 (top), image 2 (middle), and the composite spectrum (bottom). The velocity offset is measured from the host H \(\alpha\) line redshift ( \(z_{sys}=5.13\) ). Red dashed curves show the best-fit Gaussian, with which the line fluxes are measured.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：VLT/MUSE拍摄的Ly \(\alpha\)线轮廓，分别提取自像1（上）、像2（中）和复合光谱（下）。速度偏移量从宿主H \(\alpha\)线红移（\(z_{sys}=5.13\)）测量得到。红色虚线显示了最佳拟合高斯曲线，用于测量线流量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Context of the SN Eos host. (A) Eos host as a metal-poor galaxy candidate. The very low \(R3\) value found in the Eos host implies that it is a member of extremely metal-poor galaxy candidates (CR3: Cai et al. 2025 , AMORE6: Morishita et al. 2025 , LAP1-B: Vanzella et al. 2023 ; Nakajima et al. 2025 , LAP2: Vanzella et al. 2025 ). They have considerably lower \(R3\) values than other faint-end galaxies generally found in lensing fields (UNCOVER: Chemerynska et al. 2024 , GLIMPSE-D: Asada et al. 2026 , the black dashed line presents an empirical relation given by Korber et al. 2026 ), and they are potentially extremely metal-poor galaxies assuming an \(R3\) -metallicity conversion ( \(\lesssim 1\ \%Z_{\odot}\) ; purple dashed line given by Nakajima et al. 2022 conversion). (B) \(M_{UV}\) - \(z\) diagram of CCSN-host galaxies at \(z>1\) found so far. Super Luminous SNe are also included. The Eos host (the red filled star) is the faintest galaxy host at the highest redshift among spectroscopically confirmed high- \(z\) CCSN-host galaxies (black open stars; Cooke et al. , 2009 , 2012 ; Schulze et al. , 2018 ) . Hosts of photometric candidates of CCSNe found with NIRCam surveys are also plotted (thin circles DeCoursey et al. , 2025a , b ; Coulter et al. , 2026a ) . The black dashed curve is a guideline of \(M_{UV}\) corresponding to the observed magnitude of 28 mag (without lensing).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：SN Eos宿主的背景。(A) Eos宿主作为贫金属星系候选体。在Eos宿主中发现的极低\(R3\)值表明它是极端贫金属星系候选体（CR3: Cai等人2025，AMORE6: Morishita等人2025，LAP1-B: Vanzella等人2023；Nakajima等人2025，LAP2: Vanzella等人2025）的成员。它们的\(R3\)值显著低于透镜场中通常发现的其他暗弱端星系（UNCOVER: Chemerynska等人2024，GLIMPSE-D: Asada等人2026，黑色虚线显示了Korber等人2026给出的经验关系），并且假设\(R3\)-金属丰度转换关系（\(\lesssim 1\ \%Z_{\odot}\)；紫色虚线由Nakajima等人2022的转换给出），它们可能是极端贫金属星系。(B) 迄今发现的红移\(z>1\)处CCSN宿主星系的\(M_{UV}\)-红移\(z\)图。超亮超新星也包含在内。Eos宿主（红色实心星）是光谱确认的高红移CCSN宿主星系（黑色空心星；Cooke等人，2009，2012；Schulze等人，2018）中红移最高且最暗弱的星系宿主。通过NIRCam巡天发现的光度候选CCSN的宿主也一并绘出（细圆圈：DeCoursey等人，2025a，b；Coulter等人，2026a）。黑色虚线是对应于观测星等28星等（无透镜效应）的\(M_{UV}\)的指导线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Four key factors that determine the host \(M_{UV}\) probability distribution when a CCSN is found at high- \(z\) . The convolution of these four gives the shape of \(P_{host}(M_{UV})\) (Figure 6 right), and thus adopting a different assumption on the CCSN rate per unit SFR (red curve in this plot; see also Figure 6 left) affects the overall shape of \(P_{host}(M_{UV})\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：在高红移发现CCSN时，决定宿主\(M_{UV}\)概率分布的四个关键因素。这四个因素的卷积给出了\(P_{host}(M_{UV})\)的形状（图6右图），因此对单位恒星形成率下的CCSN率采用不同的假设（本图中的红色曲线；另见图6左图）会影响\(P_{host}(M_{UV})\)的整体形状。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Implication of finding of the CCSN in an ultra-faint galaxy. Left : CCSN rate per unit SFR as a function of the metallicity, normalized at the solar metallicity. Pessi et al. ( 2023 ) found that the CCSN rate per unit SFR becomes higher in low-metallicity environments down to \(\sim 10\) % \(Z_{\odot}\) in the local universe. We explore three cases to infer the SN rate at even lower-metallicity: no metallicity-dependency (black), constant extrapolation of the 2nd order polynomial derived in Pessi et al. ( 2023 ) (yellow), and log-linear extrapolation (blue). Right : the probability distribution of the host-galaxy \(M_{UV}\) when a CCSN is found at \(z\sim 5\) . The probability function is computed by convolving the UV LF by Bouwens et al. ( 2022 ) , star-formation rate, and the \(M_{UV}\) -dependent effective volume in the M1931 cluster field at \(z\sim 5.0\) (see also Figure 5 ). The top sub-panel shows the three probability distributions corresponding to the three assumptions of the CCSN rate’s metallicity-dependency. The bottom sub-panel displays the cumulative probability.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：在极暗弱星系中发现CCSN的含义。左图：单位恒星形成率下的CCSN率随金属丰度的变化，以太阳金属丰度归一化。Pessi等人（2023）发现，在本地宇宙中，单位恒星形成率下的CCSN率在低金属丰度环境中变得更高，直至\(\sim 10\)% \(Z_{\odot}\)。我们探讨了三种情况来推断更低金属丰度下的超新星率：无金属丰度依赖性（黑色）、Pessi等人（2023）导出的二阶多项式的常数外推（黄色）以及对数线性外推（蓝色）。右图：在红移\(z\sim 5\)处发现CCSN时，宿主星系\(M_{UV}\)的概率分布。概率函数通过卷积Bouwens等人（2022）的紫外光度函数、恒星形成率以及红移\(z\sim 5.0\)处M1931星团场中依赖于\(M_{UV}\)的有效体积（另见图5）计算得到。顶部子面板显示了对应于CCSN率金属丰度依赖性的三种假设的三个概率分布。底部子面板显示了累积概率。

title: How can we finally see the first light? Status and perspective in the search for Population III stars
comment: 27 pages, 14 figures, 3 tables. Proceeding of "The search for Pop III stars" session of the CSI: Sesto workshop, January 26-30 2026. Submitted to the Open Journal of Astrophysics
summary: Finding the first (Population III or Pop III) stars is one of the fundamental quests of astronomy, aiming to deliver the missing link in how stars form at early cosmic times. Yet their initial mass function, formation sites and feedback remain highly uncertain, as well as the timing and topology of the transition to metal-enriched star formation. The observability of their peculiar spectral features is also debated, due to their short lifetime and faintness. This review summarizes current theoretical expectations for Pop III star formation, and the main observational strategies that have been adopted to constrain their properties across cosmic time, including near-field cosmology studies, direct searches for extremely metal-poor star-forming complexes and/or hard-ionizing spectral signatures at high and intermediate redshifts, and prospects for identifying Pop III activity up to Cosmic Dawn. The combination of JWST spectroscopy, time-domain searches, lensing surveys, stellar archaeology, absorption-line studies, as well as improved simulations, is yielding a growing number of observational candidates and narrowing the allowed parameter space for the first stars, setting the stage for a ``golden era'' of Pop III searches.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了第一代恒星（Pop III）形成的理论预期、观测策略及未来展望，指出结合JWST光谱、时域搜索、引力透镜、恒星考古和吸收线研究等多手段正在缩小参数空间，迎来Pop III搜寻的“黄金时代”。

AI.method: 综述了理论模型对Pop III恒星形成的预期，并系统梳理了多种观测策略：近场宇宙学、直接搜寻极贫金属星形成复合体/硬电离谱线特征（高/中红移）、以及追踪至宇宙黎明的Pop III活动信号。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 寻找第一代（第三族或Pop III）恒星是天文学的基本任务之一，旨在揭示早期宇宙恒星形成过程中缺失的环节。然而，它们的初始质量函数、形成位置和反馈机制，以及向富金属恒星形成过渡的时间和拓扑结构，仍然高度不确定。由于它们寿命短且光度暗淡，其特殊光谱特征的可观测性也存在争议。本综述总结了当前对Pop III恒星形成的理论预期，以及为限制其在整个宇宙时间内的性质而采用的主要观测策略，包括近场宇宙学研究、对高红移和中等红移处极端贫金属恒星形成复合体和/或强电离光谱特征的直接搜索，以及识别直至宇宙黎明时期Pop III活动的可能性。结合JWST光谱学、时域搜索、引力透镜巡天、恒星考古学、吸收线研究以及改进的模拟，正在产生越来越多的观测候选体，并缩小了第一代恒星允许的参数空间，为Pop III搜寻的“黄金时代”奠定了基础。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：多手段协同观测与理论模拟的结合正推动Pop III搜寻进入“黄金时代”，有望揭示宇宙第一批恒星的奥秘。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Compilation of predictions on the Pop III IMF from simulations ( [1] Wollenberg et al. 2020 , [2] Prole et al. 2022 , [3] Jaura et al. 2022 , [4] Stacy and Bromm 2013 , [5] Hirano et al. 2015 , [6] Hirano et al. 2014 , colored, solid lines ), from Klessen and Glover ( 2023 ) . Models that include stellar feedback from the central proto-star (e.g. [3] , [5] , [6] ) predict larger stellar masses on average. However results also sensitively depend on the spatial resolution/time span achieved, and on details of the numerical implementation: lower-resolution (e.g. [4] , [5] , [6] ) and 2D simulations (e.g. [5] , [6] ) exhibit less fragmentation – possibly due to a less detailed modelling of the inner accretion disk –, while high-resolution, 3D simulations (e.g. [1] , [2] , [3] ) only cover a small fraction of the full accretion history, leaving the question open on the final fate of the remaining gas reservoir and of existing proto-stars. See Klessen and Glover ( 2023 ) for more details on the simulations and their comparison. Despite the large variation in mass range, however, all these predicted IMFs are approximately logarithmically flat, i.e. much more “top-heavy” compared to a standard “bottom-heavy” Chabrier IMF, typical of Pop II/I stars ( Chabrier 2003 , black, dashed line ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：来自Klessen and Glover (2023)的模拟对Pop III IMF的预测汇编（[1] Wollenberg et al. 2020, [2] Prole et al. 2022, [3] Jaura et al. 2022, [4] Stacy and Bromm 2013, [5] Hirano et al. 2015, [6] Hirano et al. 2014，彩色实线）。包含中心原恒星反馈的模型（例如[3], [5], [6]）平均预测更大的恒星质量。然而，结果也敏感地依赖于所达到的空间分辨率/时间跨度以及数值实现的细节：较低分辨率（例如[4], [5], [6]）和二维模拟（例如[5], [6]）表现出较少的碎裂——可能是由于对内部吸积盘的建模不够详细——而高分辨率三维模拟（例如[1], [2], [3]）仅覆盖了整个吸积历史的一小部分，留下了关于剩余气体储库和现有原恒星最终命运的问题。关于模拟及其比较的更多细节，请参见Klessen and Glover (2023)。尽管质量范围变化很大，但所有这些预测的IMF近似对数平坦，即与典型的Pop II/I恒星（Chabrier 2003，黑色虚线）的标准“底部重型”Chabrier IMF相比，更加“顶部重型”。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Carbon enhancement ([C/Fe]) vs metallicity ([Fe/H]) resulting from Pop III SN enrichment episodes with an increasing explosion energy (from left to right ), when considering an incremental level of contamination from subsequent generations of Pop II stars (from yellow to purple ), adapted from Vanni et al. title: MSA-3D: Rotation Curves and Dark Matter Fractions at z~0.5-1.7 with JWST/NIRSpec
comment: 21 pages + 8 appendix + 15 supplementary material, 14 figures, submitted to A&A
summary: We present rotation curves and inner mass distributions for 30 star-forming galaxies at $0.5<z<1.7$, observed with JWST/NIRSpec as part of the MSA-3D Cycle 1 survey. Combining spatially resolved ionised-gas kinematics with JWST/NIRCam imaging, we constrain baryonic and dark matter contributions through forward dynamical modelling for galaxies extending down to stellar masses of $\sim10^{9}M_\odot$. For the 23 galaxies in our primary statistical sample, we find predominantly rotationally supported disks with intrinsic dispersions $σ_0\sim31$-65 km s$^{-1}$ and a wide range of dark matter fractions, $f_{DM}(R_e)\sim0.1$-0.9, with a median of 0.63 and substantial galaxy-to-galaxy scatter of $\sim0.2$ dex. These results are supported by a complementary consistency check using stellar mass maps and SFR-derived gas profiles. Among the 19 galaxies reaching $\gtrsim2R_e$, we identify six rising, six flat, and seven falling rotation curves. These classes define an observed ordering from rotationally dominated, dark-matter-rich disks ($V_{rot}/σ_0\approx4$, $f_{DM}\gtrsim0.7$) to more dispersion-supported systems with centrally concentrated baryonic mass distributions ($V_{rot}/σ_0\approx2$, $f_{DM}\lesssim0.55$). The stellar Tully-Fisher relation lies close to the local relation evolved under the adopted self-similar $Λ$CDM scaling. A simplified seeing-degradation test shifts the inferred normalisation by ~0.2 dex at fixed $V_c$, suggesting that spatial resolution contributes to, but does not fully explain, differences among high-redshift Tully-Fisher measurements. Overall, MSA-3D provides a high-resolution extension of previous surveys toward lower stellar masses, spanning $9.0 < \log(M_\star/M_\odot) < 11.2$, and reinforces that star-forming disks near $z\sim1$ span a broad range of dynamical states and inner mass distributions.

AI.tldr: 基于JWST/NIRSpec的MSA-3D巡天数据，对30个红移0.5-1.7的恒星形成星系进行旋转曲线和暗物质分布分析，发现23个星系中暗物质分数中位数为0.63，存在旋转曲线上升、平坦、下降三种形态，且恒星Tully-Fisher关系接近局域关系。
AI.motivation: 利用JWST高分辨率数据，研究高红移（z~1）恒星形成星系的动力学状态和暗物质分布，填补较低恒星质量星系的高红移观测空白，探讨空间分辨率对Tully-Fisher关系测量的影响。
AI.method: 结合JWST/NIRSpec空间分辨电离气体运动学和JWST/NIRCam成像数据，通过正向动力学建模约束重子和暗物质贡献；使用恒星质量图和SFR导出气体剖面进行一致性检验；进行简化的视宁度退化测试。
AI.result: 23个星系中，暗物质分数f_DM(Re)范围0.1-0.9，中位数0.63，弥散约0.2 dex；19个延伸至2Re的星系中识别出6个上升、6个平坦、7个下降旋转曲线；恒星Tully-Fisher关系接近局域关系，视宁度退化会使归一化偏移约0.2 dex。
AI.conclusion: MSA-3D巡天提供了向低质量端扩展的高红移星系动力学样本，证实z~1附近恒星形成盘星系具有广泛的动力学状态和内部质量分布多样性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了30个恒星形成星系在$0.5<z<1.7$范围内的旋转曲线和内部质量分布，这些星系作为MSA-3D Cycle 1巡天的一部分，由JWST/NIRSpec观测得到。结合空间分辨的电离气体运动学与JWST/NIRCam成像，我们通过正向动力学建模约束了重子和暗物质贡献，星系恒星质量低至$\sim10^{9}M_\odot$。对于主要统计样本中的23个星系，我们发现它们主要是旋转支持的盘，固有速度弥散$σ_0\sim31$-65 km s$^{-1}$，暗物质分数$f_{DM}(R_e)\sim0.1$-0.9范围广泛，中位数为0.63，星系间弥散约$\sim0.2$ dex。这些结果得到了使用恒星质量图和SFR导出的气体分布进行的补充一致性检验的支持。在达到$\gtrsim2R_e$的19个星系中，我们识别出6个上升型、6个平坦型和7个下降型旋转曲线。这些类别定义了一个从旋转主导、暗物质丰富的盘（$V_{rot}/σ_0\approx4$，$f_{DM}\gtrsim0.7$）到更弥散支持、重子质量分布集中在中心的系统（$V_{rot}/σ_0\approx2$，$f_{DM}\lesssim0.55$）的观测排序。恒星Tully-Fisher关系接近在采用的自相似$Λ$CDM标度下演化的局域关系。一个简化的视宁度退化测试在固定$V_c$下将推断的归一化偏移了约0.2 dex，表明空间分辨率对高红移Tully-Fisher测量差异有贡献，但不能完全解释。总体而言，MSA-3D将先前巡天向更低恒星质量扩展，覆盖$9.0 < \log(M_\star/M_\odot) < 11.2$，并强化了$z\sim1$附近的恒星形成盘星系具有广泛的动力学状态和内部质量分布。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，MSA-3D巡天提供了向低质量端扩展的高红移星系动力学样本，证实z~1附近恒星形成盘星系具有广泛的动力学状态和内部质量分布多样性。

title: Cm-wavelength Studies of Molecular Gas and Star Formation at High Redshift with the SKA
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026(arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no: AASKAII/RanWang01. Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII) outlines the transformative scientific advances that will be enabled by the SKA telescopes
summary: The Square Kilometre Array will be a revolutionary instrument for the study of gas in the distant Universe. At frequencies below ~50 GHz, observations of redshifted emission from low-J transitions of CO, HCN, HCO+, and HNC, etc. provide insight into the kinematics and mass budget of the cold, dense star-forming gas in galaxies. Over the past decade, sensitive imaging using ALMA has detected and resolved the redshifted high-J molecular CO line emission and far-infrared fine structure lines in samples of galaxies over a wide redshift range, shedding light on active star-formation processes at the early epoch of galaxy evolution. In recent years, increasing numbers of young galaxies at high redshift are discovered by JWST, which significantly improved our knowledge of different galaxy populations across cosmic time. In this updated chapter of the SKA science book, we would like to highlight the importance of studies of the low-J molecular lines in high-z galaxies using SKA toward high frequencies, discussing the request of frequency coverage beyond 15 GHz and emphasizing its crucial role in exploring the cold molecular gas content in the young galaxy populations in the early universe and investigating the regions of active-star formation using molecular CO and various dense gas tracers.

AI.tldr: 本文强调了SKA在高频段（>15 GHz）观测高红移星系低阶分子谱线的重要性，特别是研究早期宇宙年轻星系中的冷分子气体含量和活跃恒星形成区域。
AI.motivation: 随着JWST发现越来越多的高红移年轻星系，需要利用SKA的高频观测能力来研究这些早期星系中的冷分子气体，弥补当前观测手段在低阶分子谱线方面的不足。
AI.method: 通过SKA在高频段（>15 GHz）对红移后的CO、HCN、HCO+等低阶分子跃迁线进行观测，结合现有ALMA和JWST的观测数据，综合分析星系中的冷气体分布与恒星形成活动。
AI.result: SKA能够探测早期宇宙年轻星系中的冷分子气体含量，并利用CO及多种致密气体示踪物研究活跃恒星形成区域。
AI.conclusion: SKA超过15 GHz的频率覆盖能力对于研究高红移星系的冷分子气体和恒星形成过程至关重要，是理解早期宇宙星系演化的关键工具。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 平方公里阵列（SKA）将成为研究遥远宇宙中气体的革命性仪器。在低于约50 GHz的频率下，观测来自CO、HCN、HCO+和HNC等分子的低J跃迁的红移发射，可以深入了解星系中冷、致密恒星形成气体的运动学和物质预算。在过去十年中，利用ALMA进行的灵敏成像已经探测并解析了广泛红移范围内星系样本中的红移高J分子CO谱线发射和远红外精细结构谱线，揭示了星系演化早期活跃的恒星形成过程。近年来，JWST发现了越来越多的高红移年轻星系，这显著提高了我们对不同星系种群在整个宇宙时间尺度上的认识。在这份更新的SKA科学书籍章节中，我们希望强调利用SKA在高频方向研究高红移星系中低J分子谱线的重要性，讨论频率覆盖范围超过15 GHz的需求，并强调其在探索早期宇宙年轻星系种群中的冷分子气体含量以及利用分子CO和各种致密气体示踪物研究活跃恒星形成区域方面的关键作用。

title: Little Red Dots on FIRE: Exploring the formation and observational signatures of ultra-compact early galaxies
summary: Little Red Dots (LRDs) are compact sources with broad Balmer lines, Balmer breaks, anomalous UV emission, rising red continuum, and uncertain origin. We use FIRE cosmological simulations, 3D dust radiative transfer, and synthetic emission-line data cubes to test whether ultra-compact early galaxies can reproduce LRD-like observables without invoking AGN. In progenitors of present-day group halos ($M_{\rm halo} > 10^{13.5} M_{\odot}$), we identify transient phases at $z \approx 4-8$ lasting $\sim 150-400$ Myr in which strong dissipative inflows build massive ($M_{\star} \sim 10^{8.5}-10^{10.5} M_{\odot}$), UV-bright ($-23 \lesssim M_{\rm UV} \lesssim -20$), ultra-compact ($R_{\rm eff} < 300$ pc) stellar cores with extreme circular velocity ($V_{\rm circ} > 500$ km s$^{-1}$) and consistent with several LRD properties: strong Balmer breaks ($F_ν(4200{\rm Å})/F_ν(3500{\rm Å}) \sim 2$); blue UV beta slopes ($β_{\rm UV} \approx -1.25$); dust masses; ALMA non-detections; and Balmer-line widths up to $\sim 1500$ km s$^{-1}$ broadened by galaxy-scale dynamics. However, stellar emission and host-galaxy kinematics alone do not reproduce the red rest-optical continuum, more extreme Balmer breaks ($\gtrsim 2.5$) and line widths ($\gtrsim 2000$ km s$^{-1}$), or the broad-Balmer/narrow-forbidden-line signature of broad-line AGN. The same ultra-compact conditions efficiently fuel central BHs, suggesting a hybrid stellar+AGN scenario in which compact stars explain the UV continuum, Balmer break, and intermediate line widths while AGN supply the red optical continuum and more extreme line properties. With halo masses $M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{11-12.5} M_\odot$ and comoving abundance $\sim 2 \times 10^{-5} {\rm cMpc}^{-3}$ (for $\sim 20\%$ duty-cycle at $z \approx 4-8$), ultra-compact galaxies can contribute to the massive, bright LRD population.

AI.tldr: 本文利用FIRE宇宙学模拟和3D尘埃辐射传输，发现超致密早期星系（不含AGN）能解释小红点（LRD）的部分观测特征（如强巴尔默跳、UV光谱斜率、尘埃质量等），但无法重现极端的红连续谱、更宽的发射线以及宽巴尔默/窄禁线特征，因此提出恒星+AGN混合模型。
AI.motivation: 小红点（LRD）是未知起源的致密源，具有宽巴尔默线、巴尔默跳、异常UV辐射和上升的红连续谱。本文旨在检验超致密早期星系能否在没有AGN的情况下重现LRD的观测特征，以厘清其物理本质。
AI.method: 采用FIRE宇宙学模拟、3D尘埃辐射传输和合成发射线数据立方体，分析z≈4–8、当前群晕前身中的瞬态超致密星系，并与JWST观测的LRD性质进行对比。
AI.result: 超致密星系可解释部分LRD特征：强巴尔默跳（~2）、蓝UVβ斜率（~-1.25）、尘埃质量、ALMA未探测、巴尔默线宽达~1500 km/s。但无法解释红连续谱、更极端的巴尔默跳（>2.5）和线宽（>2000 km/s）及宽巴尔默/窄禁线AGN特征。超致密条件同时促进中心黑洞吸积，支持混合模型。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 小红点（LRDs）是紧凑型源，具有宽巴尔默线、巴尔默跃变、异常紫外发射、上升的红色连续谱以及不确定的起源。我们利用FIRE宇宙学模拟、三维尘埃辐射传输和合成发射线数据立方体，测试超致密早期星系是否能在不涉及活动星系核（AGN）的情况下再现类似LRD的可观测特征。在现今群级暗晕（$M_{\rm halo} > 10^{13.5} M_{\odot}$）的前身中，我们识别出在$z \approx 4-8$期间持续约$\sim 150-400$ Myr的瞬态阶段，其中强烈的耗散内流构建了质量巨大（$M_{\star} \sim 10^{8.5}-10^{10.5} M_{\odot}$）、紫外明亮（$-23 \lesssim M_{\rm UV} \lesssim -20$）、超致密（$R_{\rm eff} < 300$ pc）的恒星核，具有极高的环状速度（$V_{\rm circ} > 500$ km s$^{-1}$），并与LRD的若干性质一致：强巴尔默跃变（$F_ν(4200{\rm Å})/F_ν(3500{\rm Å}) \sim 2$）；蓝色紫外β斜率（$β_{\rm UV} \approx -1.25$）；尘埃质量；ALMA未探测；以及由星系尺度动力学展宽的巴尔默线宽度高达$\sim 1500$ km s$^{-1}$。然而，仅凭恒星辐射和宿主星系运动学无法再现红色静止光学连续谱、更极端的巴尔默跃变（$\gtrsim 2.5$）和线宽（$\gtrsim 2000$ km s$^{-1}$），或宽巴尔默/窄禁线标志的宽线AGN特征。相同的超致密条件有效为中央黑洞提供燃料，暗示一种混合恒星+AGN情景：其中致密恒星解释了紫外连续谱、巴尔默跃变和中等线宽，而AGN则提供红色光学连续谱和更极端的线性质。暗晕质量$M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{11-12.5} M_\odot$且共动数密度$\sim 2 \times 10^{-5} {\rm cMpc}^{-3}$（在$z \approx 4-8$期间占空比约$\sim 20\%$）的超致密星系，可对质量巨大、明亮的LRD种群做出贡献。

title: A Rest-frame K-band View of Bulge Growth in Massive Dusty Star-forming Galaxies at z~2
comment: See Figure 4 for the key result that the stacked F770W and ALMA 870 micron profiles agree closely out to 8 kpc. Comments are welcome. Submitted to ApJ
summary: We study bulge formation in 16 massive dusty star-forming galaxies at z~2 by combining JWST MIRI F770W imaging, NIRCam imaging in eight bands, and ALMA 870 um data. At the median redshift of z=2.18, the F770W band probes the rest-frame 2.4 um light, close to the rest-frame K band, and traces the stellar mass distribution with little effect from dust attenuation. The effective radii measured in F770W agree with those of the 870 um dust emission, with a median ratio of 0.95, and are typically 23% smaller than those in F444W. The rest-frame K-band imaging is therefore essential to measure the true extent of the stellar mass, which is as compact as the dusty star-forming regions. In stacks of the 16 galaxies at a matched resolution, the 870 um and F770W profiles agree closely out to 8 kpc, and a bulge plus disk decomposition of the F770W stack gives a bulge-to-total ratio of 0.50. Fitting the SEDs in radial bins with CIGALE, we find that the attenuation decreases from Av=2.6 mag at the center to 1.5 mag at $r\gtrsim7$ kpc, while the specific star formation rate profile is flat. In these galaxies the bulge is already in place, and the whole system grows toward compact quiescent galaxies within about 1 Gyr. In two galaxies, by contrast, the 870 um emission is 3 to 6 times more compact than the F770W light, which suggests that they are still in the bulge-building compaction phase. Our sample may thus catch massive galaxies in several phases of bulge formation.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用JWST和ALMA数据，分析了红移z~2的16个巨大尘埃星暴星系中的核球形成过程。发现静止帧K波段（F770W）与870微米尘埃辐射的尺度高度一致，核球占总质量比约50%，并且系统在约10亿年内向致密静止星系演化。
AI.motivation: 理解高红移（z~2）大质量尘埃星暴星系中核球结构的形成机制，探究它们如何演化为致密的静止星系。
AI.method: 结合JWST MIRI F770W成像、NIRCam八个波段数据以及ALMA 870微米数据，对16个星系进行结构分解（核球-盘）、径向SED拟合（CIGALE）和堆叠分析。
AI.result: 1）F770W有效半径与870微米辐射尺度高度一致（中位数比值0.95），比F444W测得的半径小23%；2）堆叠分析显示核球-盘分解得到核球占比0.50；3）消光从中心Av=2.6 mag降至外围1.5 mag，比恒星形成率剖面平坦；4）两个星系的870微米比F770W紧凑3-6倍，处于核球形成压实阶段。
AI.conclusion: 这些星系正处于核球形成的不同阶段：多数星系核球已形成，将在大约10亿年内演化为致密静止星系；少数星系仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。静止帧K波段成像对测量恒星质量真实分布至关重要。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们通过结合JWST MIRI F770W成像、八个波段的NIRCam成像以及ALMA 870微米数据，研究了红移z~2处16个大规模尘埃恒星形成星系的核球形成。在z=2.18的中位红移处，F770W波段探测静止帧2.4微米光，接近静止帧K波段，并且几乎不受尘埃消光影响地追踪恒星质量分布。在F770W中测量的有效半径与870微米尘埃发射的有效半径一致，中位比值为0.95，并且通常比F444W中的有效半径小23%。因此，静止帧K波段成像对于测量恒星质量的真实范围至关重要，该范围与尘埃恒星形成区域一样致密。在匹配分辨率下对这16个星系的叠加中，870微米和F770W的轮廓在8千秒差距内紧密吻合，对F770W叠加的核球加盘分解给出了核球与总体的比值为0.50。使用CIGALE对径向分箱的SED进行拟合，我们发现消光从中心的A_V=2.6星等下降到r≳7千秒差距处的1.5星等，而比恒星形成率轮廓是平坦的。在这些星系中，核球已经就位，整个系统在大约10亿年内向致密静止星系演化。相比之下，在两个星系中，870微米发射的致密程度是F770W光的3到6倍，这表明它们仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。因此，我们的样本可能捕捉到了处于核球形成几个阶段的大质量星系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这些星系正处于核球形成的不同阶段：多数星系核球已形成，将在大约10亿年内演化为致密静止星系；少数星系仍处于核球形成的压实阶段。静止帧K波段成像对测量恒星质量真实分布至关重要。

title: Discovery of a gravitational arc candidate at photometric redshift 4.4 in MACS J0308.9+2645 from a catalogue-based search of JWST imaging
comment: Submitted to the Publications of the Astronomical Society of Japan (PASJ). 6 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables
summary: We report a strong gravitational arc (A1) in the massive Reionization Lensing Cluster Survey (RELICS) cluster MACS J0308.9+2645 (z_l = 0.356), identified in public JWST/NIRCam imaging from programme GO-5293. A1 is an extended, curved, tangentially aligned source (axis ratio a/b = 6.5, catalogue length 3.9 arcsec) located 50.9 arcsec from the cluster X-ray centre. Its six-band (1.15-4.10 micron) photometry yields a photometric redshift of z_phot = 4.4 (+0.1/-0.3), with P(z > 3) = 0.99. Using the public Zitrin-LTM-Gauss lens model, A1 lies at a median projected separation of 4.6 arcsec from the tangential critical curve for a source at z = 4.4 and is predicted to have a median absolute magnification of |mu| = 7, providing quantitative support for the lensing interpretation from a model built independently of this work. A fainter arclet (A2) at a comparable radius is reported as a secondary candidate. A1 is absent from the cluster's published multiple-image inventory and from the SIMBAD, NED, and VizieR databases. Spectroscopic redshift determination and dedicated lens modelling are required for confirmation.

AI.tldr: 该论文报告在RELICS星系团MACS J0308.9+2645中发现了一个强引力弧A1，其测光红移为z_phot=4.4，透镜模型预测中位放大率为|μ|=7，并报告了一个较暗的次要候选体A2，但需要光谱红移和专用透镜模型进行确认。
AI.motivation: 在已知星系团中发现高红移强引力弧候选体，为研究早期宇宙提供放大效应观测机会。
AI.method: 利用JWST/NIRCam六波段成像数据获取测光红移，结合公开的Zitrin-LTM-Gauss透镜模型计算投影距离和放大率，评估引力透镜解释的合理性。
AI.result: 发现了一个强引力弧A1（轴比6.5，长度3.9角秒），测光红移z_phot=4.4，透镜模型预测其中位放大率为7，且A1不在已知多像系统及数据库记录中。
AI.conclusion: A1是一个高置信度的高红移强引力弧候选体，但需要后续光谱观测和专用透镜建模来最终确认其性质。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告在巨质量再电离透镜星团巡天（RELICS）星团MACS J0308.9+2645（红移z_l = 0.356）中发现一个强引力弧（A1），该弧在GO-5293项目的公开JWST/NIRCam成像中被识别。A1是一个延伸、弯曲、切向对齐的源（轴比a/b = 6.5，星表长度3.9角秒），位于星团X射线中心50.9角秒处。其六波段（1.15-4.10微米）测光得出光测红移z_phot = 4.4（+0.1/-0.3），P(z > 3) = 0.99。利用公开的Zitrin-LTM-Gauss透镜模型，A1在z = 4.4源对应的切向临界曲线中位投影距离为4.6角秒，预测中位绝对放大率|mu| = 7，这为独立于本工作构建的模型提供了透镜解释的定量支持。一个较暗的微弧（A2）位于相近半径处，被报告为次级候选体。A1未出现在该星团已发布的多重像星表中，也不在SIMBAD、NED和VizieR数据库中。需要光谱红移测定和专用透镜建模来确认。

title: Lambda as a Probe of Lensing Consistency
summary: We introduce a framework to identify the radial transition in mass reconstruction reliability between strong and weak gravitational lensing in galaxy clusters. In weak lensing reconstruction, the convergence recovered from the reduced shear is subject to the mass-sheet degeneracy. We demonstrate that the degeneracy itself can serve as an indicator of the reconstruction reliability, and introduce a spatially resolved parameter $λ(r)$ to characterize this as a function of radius. We validate this approach on simulated clusters with realistic observational noise, and show that $λ(r)$ naturally quantifies the relative reliability of the two probes. Furthermore, when the global mass-sheet parameter $λ$ is constrained directly using strong lensing information, the tightest constraints arise where the two probes achieve comparable precision. This provides a quantitative basis for joint strong and weak lensing mass reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个框架，通过引入空间分辨参数λ(r)来识别星系团中强引力透镜与弱引力透镜在质量重建可靠性上的径向转换，并验证了该参数能自然量化两种探针的相对可靠性，为联合重建提供了定量基础。
AI.motivation: 弱引力透镜重建中的质量片简并性会影响重建可靠性，而强、弱透镜在不同尺度上的可靠性差异缺乏定量描述指标，因此需要一个框架来识别两者之间的径向转换点。
AI.method: 引入空间分辨参数λ(r)来表征质量片简并性随半径的变化，通过在模拟星系团中加入真实观测噪声来验证该方法的有效性。
AI.result: λ(r)能够自然量化强、弱引力透镜的相对可靠性；当利用强透镜信息约束全局质量片参数λ时，两种探针精度可比时约束最强。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为强、弱引力透镜联合质量重建提供了定量基础，有助于提高星系团质量测量的准确性和可靠性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出一个框架，用于识别星系团中强引力透镜与弱引力透镜之间质量重建可靠性的径向转变。在弱透镜重建中，从约化切变恢复的收敛受到质量片简并的影响。我们证明该简并本身可以作为重建可靠性的指标，并引入一个空间分辨参数 $λ(r)$ 来表征其随半径的变化。我们在具有真实观测噪声的模拟星团上验证了该方法，并表明 $λ(r)$ 自然地量化了两种探针的相对可靠性。此外，当利用强透镜信息直接约束全局质量片参数 $λ$ 时，最紧的约束出现在两种探针达到相当精度的区域。这为联合强、弱引力透镜质量重建提供了定量基础。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该框架为强、弱引力透镜联合质量重建提供了定量基础，有助于提高星系团质量测量的准确性和可靠性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The upper panel shows how \(\lambda_{rec}(r)\) varies with radius. The horizontal black dashed line marks the true \(\lambda\) value inferred from the noiseless case. The orange dashed line is the \(\lambda\) value inferred from the strong and weak lensing comparison over \(100\) - \(300{kpc}\,h^{-1}\) . The data points show the median \(\lambda_{rec}\) values in each radial bin, with error bars indicating the \(16\) th to \(84\) th percentile range. The lower panel shows the RMSE of the strong and weak lensing reconstructions. For visual guidance, the yellow shaded region marks the transition region, defined as the radial range satisfying \(|{RMSE_{SL}}(r)-{RMSE_{WL}}(r)|/\frac{1}{2}|{RMSE_{SL}}(r)+{RMSE_{WL}}(r)|<0.5\) . The red and blue curves represent the RMSE of the SL and WL reconstructions, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：上方面板显示 \(\lambda_{rec}(r)\) 随半径的变化。水平黑色虚线标记从无噪声情况推断出的真实 \(\lambda\) 值。橙色虚线是在 \(100\) - \(300{kpc}\,h^{-1}\) 范围内从强、弱透镜比较推断出的 \(\lambda\) 值。数据点显示每个径向区间内 \(\lambda_{rec}\) 的中值，误差棒表示第 \(16\) 至第 \(84\) 百分位范围。下方面板显示强、弱透镜重建的RMSE。为便于观察，黄色阴影区域标记过渡区，定义为满足 \(|{RMSE_{SL}}(r)-{RMSE_{WL}}(r)|/\frac{1}{2}|{RMSE_{SL}}(r)+{RMSE_{WL}}(r)|<0.5\) 的径向范围。红色和蓝色曲线分别表示SL和WL重建的RMSE。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Radial profiles of the convergence \(\kappa\) at \(z_{s}=2.0\) for the simulated cluster. The grey line shows the input truth, blue squares show the weak lensing reconstruction after correcting the mass-sheet degeneracy using the SL-inferred \(\lambda_{P}=1.141\) , and red diamonds show the strong lensing reconstruction. The truth and SL profiles are smoothed to match the resolution of the WL reconstruction. The error bars indicate the scatter of \(\kappa\) within each radial bin, and the shaded region around the truth profile shows its \(\pm 1\) standard deviation. The inset zooms into the radial range \(100\leq r\leq 330~{kpc}\,h^{-1}\) , where the relative accuracy of the SL and WL reconstructions is comparable.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：模拟星团在 \(z_{s}=2.0\) 处收敛 \(\kappa\) 的径向轮廓。灰色线显示输入真值，蓝色方块显示使用SL推断的 \(\lambda_{P}=1.141\) 校正质量片简并后的弱透镜重建，红色菱形显示强透镜重建。真值和SL轮廓经过平滑以匹配WL重建的分辨率。误差棒表示每个径向区间内 \(\kappa\) 的离散程度，真值轮廓周围的阴影区域显示其 \(\pm 1\) 标准差。插图放大了径向范围 \(100\leq r\leq 330~{kpc}\,h^{-1}\) ，其中SL和WL重建的相对精度相当。
